texto: What sort of attractions do you think lured our coreligionists out of the ghetto and into the mainstream of European culture? Was it the wit of Molière, or the ingenious stage mechanisms of Pixérécourt? Or was it simply the opportunity to cast an eye, without shame, upon the living, unclad human form?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Ben Katchor que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “What sort of attractions do you think lured our coreligionists out of the ghetto and into the mai…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, drama, jews, com foco em jews.
